summary: R2 独立 QA 复核通过。上一轮 P2 已解决：M7 UI regression matrix 不再在同一个 page 上叠加多个 addInitScript，而是为每个 locale/viewport scenario 创建独立 browser context 和 page，使用配置 baseURL，每个 scenario 独立捕获 console/pageerror，并在 finally 中关闭 context。system-language 场景仍验证 Language/语言切换和 localStorage 持久化。Diff 仍限于允许路径，没有新增 forbidden path、release/signing/update/telemetry/account/cloud-save/commercial workflow，也未探入 sim-core 权威状态或 Pixi 内部。

tests_run.result: ## codex/m7-ui-regression-matrix...origin/codex/m7-ui-regression-matrix; clean before QA R2 handoff write.
Diff includes allowed process/message/task files and tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts only.
No whitespace or patch formatting errors.
VALID R2 writer handoff; status REVIEW and route_to qa_reviewer.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for task file

tests_run.result: Reviewed R2 test diff. The M7 matrix now uses browser.newContext with scenario viewport/baseURL, context.addInitScript once per context, context.newPage, per-page console/pageerror capture, and finally context.close.

No forbidden path output for sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, content packages, apps/sim-runner, apps/content-tools, content-source, tools, .github, frozen docs, PROJECT_STATUS, manifests, or validation reports.

tests_run.command: git diff origin/main...HEAD -G"release|signing|sign|telemetry|account|cloud-save|cloudSave|commercial|autoUpdater|update" -- scoped changed paths
tests_run.result: Reviewed matches; additions are process text/handoff statements only. No release, signing, update, telemetry, account, cloud-save, or commercial workflow was added.
Focused Chromium Playwright test passed: 1 passed (2.9s).
Confirmed Playwright config defines use.baseURL as http://127.0.0.1:4173 and chromium-only project, matching the R2 context baseURL usage.

decisions.result: ACCEPT. The prior init-script ordering and locale scenario isolation defect is resolved.
Each locale/viewport scenario runs in a fresh browser context and page; there is no accumulation of multiple page.addInitScript calls on one page.

Coverage still includes system-language, English, zh-CN, language switching, localStorage persistence, visible raw-key hygiene, no player-mode debug/prototype text, console-error/pageerror checks, and representative Beta viewports.

The regression remains observable-only through DOM attributes, visible text, localStorage, and browser events; it does not inspect authoritative WorldState, sim-core internals, or Pixi DisplayObject internals.
Firefox, Edge, Windows DPI, and full platform/resolution localization permutations remain correctly deferred to M7-PLATFORM-RESOLUTION-LOCALIZATION-MATRIX-001.

risks: Chromium-only focused coverage is acceptable for this task because the task and R2 handoff explicitly defer Firefox/Edge/DPI/platform permutations to the separate platform/resolution localization matrix task.
The R2 route file remains a process routing artifact; lead_orchestrator should normalize any route status bookkeeping during integration if required.
requested_action: Integrate M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 if lead gates remain clean, preserving the deferred Firefox/Edge/DPI/platform matrix risk for the dedicated platform task.
